title: jasminum curtisii
intro: Jasminum curtisii, also known as the night-blooming jasmine, is a tropical evergreen climbing plant native to the Western Ghats of India. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jasminum curtisii include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems.
